style: Full iPhone-background promo artwork: each app screen fills the whole vertical image as a blurred coastal backdrop, with a large integrated iPhone-style panel, bold headline, glass caption card, and puffin orange/sea-blue accents.

items.headline: Book Your Island Cruise
items.subtitle: Browse sailings, reviews and book your Coquet Island trip in seconds.

items.headline: Follow The Boat Live
items.subtitle: See the cruise route, harbour points and crew-shared boat position on the map.

items.headline: Spot Puffins And Seals
items.subtitle: Explore seasonal wildlife before you sail around Coquet Island.

items.headline: Reserve Seats Fast
items.subtitle: Pick your date, time and passengers with a clear booking flow.

items.headline: Tickets Ready Onboard
items.subtitle: Keep QR boarding passes, cruise details and updates in one place.

items.headline: Know Before You Go
items.subtitle: Find parking, check-in details, dining nearby and what to bring.
